flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Lycoming College rose 19% between 2006 and 2009 ($25.1k → $29.9k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Lycoming College rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($44.2k → $50.0k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 7 pp at Lycoming College vs the 2003–2007 baseline (59.6% vs 66.6%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Lycoming College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.8% → 0.0%).
